hero.description: LIQUODA connects issuers and investors on a secure, transparent platform. Invest in real projects — digital, direct, without a bank.

howItWorks.title: How LIQUODA works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account as an issuer or investor — free and in just a few minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse verified Swiss projects across various industries.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Invest securely in CHF. Tokens serve as your digital proof of ownership.

register.title: Register now
register.subtitle: Choose your role and create your account.
register.roleIssuerDesc: I am looking for capital for my project
register.roleInvestorDesc: I want to invest in projects
register.successMessage: We will be in touch soon.
register.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
